Sanctity.name: Banishment
Sanctity.effect: All melee attacks of the target gain the (cumulative) "Shield breaker(-1)" ability.

Sanctity.name: Cleanse Soul
Sanctity.effect: Both the Psyker and the target roll a D6 and add their respective Leadership values. If the target's total is greater than the Psyker's total, nothing happens. If the Psyker's total is greater than or equal to the target's total, the target model suffers one Mortal Wound.

Sanctity.name: Sanctuary
Sanctity.effect: The target gains the "Aegis(4+)" and "Warded" abilities. All terrain around the target within 6" is treated as difficult and dangerous for enemy units, even if they would normally ignore it.

Sanctity.name: Astral Aim
Sanctity.effect: The target gains the "Indirect" and "Seeking" abilities for ranged attacks.

Sanctity.name: Destruction
Sanctity.effect: The target suffers one automatic hit with S: 5 AP: -2 D: 1; Barrage, Poison(2+), Seeking.

Dominus.name: Warp Shaping
Dominus.effect: All psychic tests (of all players) receive a bonus OR penalty of 1.

Dominus.name: Empyric Amplification
Dominus.effect: Ranged attacks of the target gain (cumulative) -1 AP and AT(1).

Dominus.name: Ghostly Bonds
Dominus.effect: The target receives one Battleshock marker.

Dominus.name: Gate
Dominus.effect: Remove the unit immediately and place it on the table again via the rules for Deep Strike. The scatter die is always a "hit". The command of the target unit is changed to "Move & Shoot" when it is activated. It already counts as having moved the maximum distance.

Dominus.name: Psy-steel Armor
Dominus.effect: The target improves its Saving throw by +2.

Dominus.name: Vortex
Dominus.effect: The target suffers one automatic wound or penetrating hit with S: D AP: -4 D: 3; AT(4), Seeking.
